notes: Formalized from active loose audit/fixes notes during the validated-taxonomy cleanup.
Implementation predates the 2026-05-01 TDD policy; remaining work is browser QA.

tdd.note: Gardener-facing UI fixes were completed before the TDD proof policy; do not invent historical RED/GREEN evidence.
Shared/client gating and copy-support changes were completed before the TDD proof policy; do not invent historical RED/GREEN evidence.
No contract lane is planned for the gardener-first PWA audit.

browser_verified: browser-vs-pwa boundary at desktop 1302x629 and mobile 447x629
/home/:id non-operator header (Ilhas, Vida Verde, Green Goods Community Garden) — no governance/endowment icons

/home/:id operator positive contrast (Aiyeloja Family Garden) — View notifications + Open endowment chips appear; governance icon still absent because Aiyeloja has no Conviction strategy configured (matches gating)
/profile <details> Account details collapsed by default; toggle increases #profile-scroll.scrollHeight by exactly 254px (the inner block height)
code_only: /home/:id/assessments/:assessmentId gardener-friendly rows (no assessment data exists in local dev dataset, even on operator-side Aiyeloja)
/home/:id Governance icon positive case (no garden in dev has Conviction strategy + active user as operator)

browser_verified: /?presentation=website keeps the public SiteHeader and has no authenticated bottom nav
/gardens/vida-verde?presentation=website keeps the public shell and opens the Garden not found dialog because local public garden data is empty

/home?presentation=pwa redirects unauthenticated users to /login; /login shows Create your account as primary and Sign in with a wallet as secondary; clicking primary reveals the display-name input and Create account action
code_verified: Login.test.tsx, Assessment.test.tsx, and ProfileAccount.test.tsx passed via the root Vitest entrypoint: 3 files, 30 tests
Garden header gating remains source-correct: showGovernanceButton requires hasGovernanceConfigured && canReview; showEndowmentButton requires vaults plus canReview or own deposit
Assessment route remains source/test-correct for non-operator metric rows and operator-only impact attestations
blocked_repros: packages/client/src/views/Profile/Account.tsx renders <AccountInfo /> directly at top level, with no <details>/<summary> disclosure
rg 'app\.profile\.accountDetails(Title|Hint)' packages/client/src packages/shared/src/i18n returns no matches, so the Account details disclosure copy contract is absent
packages/client/src/views/Profile/AccountInfo.tsx renders Account, auth method, address, passkey warning, and logout directly
packages/client/src/views/Profile/index.tsx still states raw addresses live behind the Account details disclosure, but the disclosure no longer exists
proof_limits: No authenticated live PWA Home/Garden/Profile check in this pass because the available browser profile was logged out
No populated public Garden dialog check because local public garden data was empty
No fresh mobile runtime screenshot because headless Chromium launch required sandbox escalation and that escalation was rejected
No runtime Governance positive case because local data/auth did not provide canReview plus configured Conviction strategy

history.note: Formalized active loose audit as QA-ready hub; implementation proof remains legacy_unrecorded and manual browser pass is next.

Browser walkthrough completed at desktop 1302x629 and mobile 447x629 against running dev:web. Browser-verified: shell boundary, /home/:id non-operator header gating, /profile Account details disclosure collapsed default. Code-only: /login passkey-first (would require destroying auth session) and /home/:id/assessments/:assessmentId (no assessment data in local dataset). Evidence in handoffs/claude-qa-pass-1.md.

Independent QA pass found the Account details disclosure expected by qa_pass_1 is no longer present on release/1.1.0: ProfileAccount renders AccountInfo directly, the accountDetailsTitle/accountDetailsHint keys are absent, and account/address/passkey warning/logout content is visible at top level. Focused Login/Assessment/ProfileAccount tests passed via root Vitest; unauthenticated browser profile and empty public garden data limited live PWA and populated dialog proof. Evidence in handoffs/codex-qa-pass-2.md.
